untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires multi-bar peak/valley identification, width measurement, and spike morphology analysis. The EEDT pattern depends on: (1) identifying two distinct peaks at similar price levels, (2) measuring peak width in bars, (3) detecting peak 'pointedness' vs 'width', (4) calculating valley dip of 14%, (5) measuring peak-to-peak separation of ~55 days, and (6) analyzing spike composition within peaks. No single-bar indicator or combination of allowed indicators can reliably detect this complex multi-bar pattern structure. Would require custom pattern recognition logic outside standard indicator framework.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy entry: close below SMA_20 (downside breakout) + volume heavier than 20-period historical average (volume confirmation). Exit: reversal above SMA_20. However, this is a weak approximation that does NOT capture the specific EEDT morphology, peak characteristics, valley depth, or timing requirements. A proper implementation requires custom pattern scanner for double-top detection with peak width/pointedness analysis.
